scripts.build: npm -w @hailmary/contracts run build && npm -w @hailmary/web run build
scripts.test: npm -w @hailmary/contracts run test && npm -w @hailmary/web run test
scripts.lint: npm -w @hailmary/contracts run lint && npm -w @hailmary/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @hailmary/contracts run typecheck && npm -w @hailmary/web run typecheck
